name: Airlux Electrical Co., Ltd.
summary: Airlux Electrical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical appliances in China and internationally. The company offers stand mixers, table blenders, hand blenders, cooking machines, and juice extractors, as well as electric blankets and food processors. Airlux Electrical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
